What are the benefits of using TypeScript over JavaScript?
TypeScript adds static typing, better IDE support, and early error detection. It compiles to JavaScript and is especially useful for large codebases where type safety reduces runtime bugs significantly.
How do I configure strict mode in tsconfig.json?
Set "strict": true in your compilerOptions. This enables strictNullChecks, noImplicitAny, strictFunctionTypes, and other safety rules all at once.
